# Specification: <spec-title>

## Metadata

- Spec ID: `<spec-id>`
- Status: `draft | under-review | approved | superseded`
- Owner: `<product-owner-or-human>`
- Created: `<yyyy-mm-dd>`
- Updated: `<yyyy-mm-dd>`
- Source: `<issue/request/discussion/link>`

## Human approval

- Approved by: `<name-or-role>`
- Approval date: `<yyyy-mm-dd>`
- Approval notes: `<summary>`

## Problem

Describe the problem, pain or opportunity.

## Goal

Describe the expected outcome.

## Users or systems affected

- `<user/system>`

## Product value

Explain why this matters.

## Scope

### In scope

- `<item>`

### Out of scope

- `<item>`

## Acceptance criteria

Use testable statements.

- Given `<context>`
  When `<action>`
  Then `<expected result>`

## Business rules

- `<approved business rule>`

## Constraints

- `<constraint>`

## Assumptions

- `<assumption>`

## Open questions

- `<question>`

## Risks

- `<risk>`

## Non-functional requirements

- Performance: `<requirement or not-applicable>`
- Security: `<requirement or not-applicable>`
- Accessibility: `<requirement or not-applicable>`
- Observability: `<requirement or not-applicable>`
- Compatibility: `<requirement or not-applicable>`

## Context updates required

- `context/product.md`: `<yes/no + note>`
- `context/business-rules.md`: `<yes/no + note>`
- `context/architecture.md`: `<yes/no + note>`
- `context/stack.md`: `<yes/no + note>`
- `context/decisions.md`: `<yes/no + note>`
- `context/glossary.md`: `<yes/no + note>`
- `context/constraints.md`: `<yes/no + note>`
- `context/current-state.md`: `<yes/no + note>`

## Planning readiness checklist

- [ ] Product Owner approved product intent with the human.
- [ ] Scope is clear.
- [ ] Out-of-scope items are explicit.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are testable.
- [ ] Constraints are documented.
- [ ] Stack context is known or explicitly marked as pending.
- [ ] Required specialist agents are known or explicitly marked as pending.
- [ ] Open questions do not block planning.
